description_long: This is a large, double-bladed battle axe with a dramatic, fantasy-inspired design. The axe features two wide, symmetrical blades with multiple sharp points and cut-out holes, giving it an aggressive and ornamental appearance. The central section of the axe head includes a prominent upward-pointing spike, flanked by two smaller spikes, enhancing its menacing look. The handle is straight, cylindrical, and appears to be made of metal, with several decorative rings and a flared pommel at the base for grip and balance. The entire object is finished in a dark, matte color, suggesting a steel or iron construction. The overall design is both functional and highly stylized, suitable for display or theatrical use rather than practical urban utility.
description: A large, double-bladed fantasy axe with ornate, spiked blades and a straight, metal handle. The design is dark, aggressive, and highly decorative.
description_view_0: A narrow, edge-on view showing the thin profile of the axe and the pointed spike at the top.
description_view_1: A full frontal view displaying the wide, double blades with multiple spikes and cut-outs, as well as the detailed handle.
description_view_2: Another edge-on view, nearly identical to view 0, emphasizing the slimness of the blade and handle.
description_view_3: A rear view similar to the front, showing the symmetrical blade design and handle details.
attribute_handle_type: Straight, cylindrical metal handle with decorative rings and a flared pommel; appears rigid and ergonomic.
attribute_blade_design: Double-bladed with symmetrical, wide, spiked edges and multiple cut-out holes; central upward spike and two smaller side spikes.
attribute_mounting_style: Modern, integrated metal construction with no visible wedging or pinning.
